verse.name: V1
verse.lines: The preacher listened closely To the broken mother's heart As she talked about Her daughter gone astray Feeling so ashamed She wants to take the blame And she wonders Where she made her mistake

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: But the preacher said, This prodigal knows the way to Calvary And the Word says That she won't run for long So let's keep believing In God's higher way Know that until She's back where she belongs

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: She's working on her testimony Though the way she chose is lonely Know that there's A victory down the road Cause someday she'll share her story And help somebody else to make it home Don't worry, She's working on her testimony

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: This could be your story You're praying, "Lord, how long? What will it take for my child to be saved?" You know God has a plan, You've placed it in His hands But it's hard to leave it there and walk away

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: There's a promise to your children The same one He's given you That together you will spend eternity No failure is final When God extends His grace But until then just speak And with all your heart believe

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: They're working on their testimony Though the way they chose is lonely Know that there's a victory down the road Cause someday they'll share their story And help somebody else to make it home Don't worry, They're working on their testimony
